title: The Exact Value of R(B12, B14)
lean_gate_reason: Lean would only formalize an alternate proof of a result that the latest accessible public record already treats as solved. Under the active micro-paper objective, novelty rather than formal sealing is the blocking issue.
micro_paper_assessment: Fail for the active micro-paper lane. The proof candidate is structural, but the latest accessible public record already treats R(B12, B14)=53 as solved / implied, so the packet is stale as a frontier target.
strongest_honest_claim: If correct, the local Goodman-plus-strongly-regular obstruction argument gives an independent structural proof that R(B12, B14) <= 53. Combined with published lower-bound literature, that rederives the now-public exact value R(B12, B14) = 53, so under the active frontier objective this packet is a rediscovery / alternate-proof packet rather than a new micro-paper.
paper_title_hint: A Structural Proof of the Known Value R(B12, B14)=53
candidate_theorem_slice: If correct, the local argument proves that any 53-vertex graph avoiding B12 whose complement avoids B14 would force the nonexistent strongly regular parameter set (53,26,11,14).
